title: Optimizing Pay-Per-Call Campaigns with monday.com: Tools & Strategies

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’ve been looking into Pay-Per-Call marketing techniques and want to talk about the best ways and tools to run campaigns effectively. Specifically:

Top Pay-Per-Call platforms – What software do you suggest for keeping track of calls, improving conversions, and working with CRM systems?

Automation & workflow ideas – How can technologies like Monday.com aid in automatically recording call data or automating campaign tracking?

ROI tracking strategies – The best ways to measure performance and find calls that lead to sales.

Challenges & lessons learned – Any pitfalls you’ve experienced with pay-per-call campaigns or software?

I’d be interested in knowing your thoughts, integrations, and advice, particularly if you’ve linked Monday.com workflows to call monitoring software.

Thanks in advance!
